ssh.decryptCredentialsFailed: Unable to decrypt SSH credentials. Please re-save this server credentials.
ssh.folderConflict: A folder with this name already exists.
ssh.hostFingerprintUntrusted: Host fingerprint is not trusted yet.
ssh.passwordNotConfigured: Password is required but not configured for this server.
ssh.privateKeyNotConfigured: Private key is required but not configured for this server.
ssh.serverConflict: A server with the same host, port, and username already exists.
ssh.tagConflict: A tag with this name already exists.
ssh.tagsNotFound: One or more tags were not found.

validation.authTypeEnum: Auth type must be one of: password, key, both.
validation.colsRange: cols must be an integer between 20 and 400.
validation.connectTimeoutRange: connectTimeoutSec must be an integer between 5 and 180.
validation.fingerprintAlgorithmUnsupported: Only sha256 host fingerprint algorithm is supported.
validation.fingerprintLength: fingerprintSha256 is required and must be 1-255 characters.
validation.folderNameLength: Folder name is required and must be 1-120 characters.
validation.folderNoteLength: Folder note must be 1000 characters or fewer.
validation.hostLength: Host is required and must be 1-255 characters.
validation.noteLength: Note must be 3000 characters or fewer.
validation.passwordRequiredForAuthType: Password is required for selected authentication type.
validation.portRange: Port must be an integer in range 1-65535.
validation.privateKeyRequiredForAuthType: Private key is required for selected authentication type.
validation.requestBodyMustBeObject: Request body must be a JSON object.
validation.rowsRange: rows must be an integer between 10 and 200.
validation.scopeAccountIdLength: scope.accountId must be 120 characters or fewer.
validation.scopeDeviceIdLength: scope.deviceId must be 120 characters or fewer.
validation.serverNameLength: Server name is required and must be 1-120 characters.
validation.tagNameLength: Tag name is required and must be 1-64 characters.
validation.termLength: term must be a string between 2 and 64 characters.
validation.usernameLength: Username is required and must be 1-120 characters.

validation.notObject: Request body must be a JSON object.

ws.sessionReconnectedFromNewClient: Session reconnected from a new client.
